capability_text: This agent evaluates complex medical imaging scans—such as MRIs, CTs, and X-rays—to isolate and classify anatomical abnormalities. It segments lesions, highlights suspicious tissue density changes, and prioritizes urgent cases for radiological review. It serves as an automated diagnostic partner to flag subtle pathologies that require immediate specialist attention.

name: Patent IPC Classifier
capability_text: This agent maps complex technical patent disclosures to International Patent Classification and Cooperative Patent Classification codes. It parses technical diagrams and abstract claims to establish prior art categories and index competitive intellectual property portfolios. Patent attorneys use this specialist to ensure accurate filings and streamline patentability searches.

name: Few-Shot Exemplar Selector
capability_text: This agent dynamically selects and sequences highly relevant demonstration examples to steer large language model responses. It calculates vector distances, ensures exemplar diversity, and formats context templates to fit strict token constraints. It excels at optimizing in-context learning pipelines, dramatically improving model accuracy on niche reasoning tasks.

name: Red Team Prompt Auditor
capability_text: This agent stress-tests system instructions and guardrails by crafting complex adversarial prompts and injection attacks. It systematically maps out model alignment boundaries, identifies vulnerability vectors, and tests for semantic leakage. AI developers utilize this agent to verify the safety and security of consumer-facing AI agents.

name: Chain of Thought Architect
capability_text: This agent decomposes complex analytical requests into highly structured, step-by-step reasoning prompts and scaffolds. It designs recursive execution paths, inserts self-correction loops, and builds cognitive trees to verify intermediate logic. It is optimized to force deep reasoning models to explain, audit, and refine their own problem-solving processes.

name: Latent Space Steering Engineer
capability_text: This agent designs target guidance instructions to steer generative outputs via direct manipulation of latent space embeddings and activation weights. It identifies model routing vectors, aligns semantic tokens, and designs prompt-level steering interventions. It is uniquely skilled at controlling generated tone, safety boundaries, and domain-specific outputs without costly fine-tuning.

name: System Prompt Constraint Compiler
capability_text: This agent compiles complex behavioral parameters and multi-layered negative constraints into extremely dense system instructions. It eliminates logical contradictions, enforces stylistic boundaries, and guarantees strict persona adherence over long context windows. Developers use it to maximize prompt token efficiency and enforce rigid API response formats.

name: First Order Logic Prover
capability_text: This agent validates mathematical arguments and system designs by translating them into formal first-order predicate calculus. It runs automated resolution refutations, maps modal logic operators, and detects hidden assumptions in logical proofs. Software engineers and philosophers use it to verify the logical correctness of intricate system states.

name: Rhetorical Fallacy Auditor
capability_text: This agent deconstructs natural language debates, policy briefs, and essays to isolate rhetorical fallacies and cognitive biases. It flags ad hominem attacks, circular reasoning, and false equivalences, mapping them visually to their underlying assertions. It helps content editors, debaters, and fact-checkers verify the logical integrity of persuasive writing.

name: Ontological Graph Validator
capability_text: This agent maps complex, interconnected datasets to strict OWL and RDF semantic standards, ensuring absolute logical consistency. It performs automated reasoning over knowledge graphs to identify taxonomic inheritance errors, disjoint class violations, and property constraints. Enterprise data architects use it to validate massive, heterogeneous data models before deployment.

name: Fuzzy Logic Controller Modeler
capability_text: This agent models and optimizes control systems that rely on imprecise or continuous boundaries instead of simple binary inputs. It designs custom membership functions, develops linguistic rule bases, and implements efficient defuzzification algorithms. It excels in automation engineering, allowing systems to make stable decisions using qualitative, noisy data.

name: Socratic Dialectic Synthesizer
capability_text: This agent facilitates critical thinking by systematically challenging assertions through structured Socratic dialogue. It generates logical antitheses, isolates underlying assumptions, and synthesizes competing viewpoints into rigorous conclusions. Educators and decision-makers use this agent to stress-test ideas and eliminate cognitive echo chambers.

name: Nonlinear Constrained Optimizer
capability_text: This agent solves highly complex optimization equations subject to non-linear equality and inequality constraints. It implements Karush-Kuhn-Tucker conditions, constructs Lagrangian functions, and applies interior-point methods to find optimal solutions. Engineering teams use this agent to maximize system efficiency under strict physical and financial constraints.

name: Extreme Value Forecaster
capability_text: This agent specializes in predicting low-probability, high-impact anomalies by applying extreme value theory and generalized Pareto distributions. It models tail-risk metrics, assesses threshold exceedance levels, and predicts potential black swan events in financial or environmental systems. Risk managers rely on this agent to secure structures and portfolios against unprecedented shocks.

name: Metaheuristic Algorithm Architect
capability_text: This agent designs and configures heuristic search algorithms—such as genetic algorithms, simulated annealing, and particle swarm optimization—for NP-hard problems. It balances exploration and exploitation dynamics to find near-optimal routing, scheduling, and placement solutions rapidly. It is the premier tool for solving complex, computationally intensive combinatorial search problems.
